summary: Comprehensive testing of PSX (Pakistan Stock Exchange) KSE-100 live data feature - All features working correctly. Backend API returns live scraped data from dps.psx.com.pk. Frontend displays KSE-100 value in Economic Panel and opens detailed PSX modal on click.
passed_tests: PSX data contains day high (161,435.83) - displayed in green
PSX data contains day low (157,072.64) - displayed in red
PSX data contains source: Pakistan Stock Exchange
Day High >= Day Low validation passes
Daily change percent within circuit breaker limits
KSE-100 indicator visible in Economic Panel at index 2
KSE-100 shows live value (157,496.1) and percentage change
Clicking KSE-100 indicator opens PSX modal
PSX modal shows Day High in green
PSX modal shows Day Low in red
PSX modal shows source 'PAKISTAN STOCK EXCHANGE'
PSX modal close button (X) works correctly
PSX modal closes when clicking overlay
seed_data_creation: None needed - PSX data is scraped live from Pakistan Stock Exchange (dps.psx.com.pk)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PSX KSE-100 feature fully tested. Live data scraped from https://dps.psx.com.pk/ using regex parsing. API caches data for 5 minutes. Modal displays all stats correctly with appropriate color coding (green for high/positive, red for low/negative). Close button and overlay close both work.
